  "findings": [
    "Insufficient asphalt shingle overhang at the rake and eave edges"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a drip edge if missing, or remove and reinstall the starter and first courses of shingles to establish the required 3/8-inch to 3/4-inch overhang"
  ],
  "rationale": "Asphalt shingles must overhang the eave and rake edges by 3/8 inch to 3/4 inch (or per manufacturer specifications) to prevent water from backing up under the shingles or running down the fascia. An insufficient overhang fails to meet manufacturer installation instructions and IRC R905 requirements.",

    "IRC R905.2.8.5",
    "Manufacturer Shingle Installation Instructions"
  ]
